Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Benri Vallenar]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 1''' — Benri Vallenar is the President of the Vallenar Corporation and a silver-eyed Archmage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Benri Vallenar is a man who channeled a greater spell than any he had ever cast in centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Benri is the father of Varic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Benri uses a staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Benri is a wizard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Benri Vallenar is a man who observed the ruins of an Iron Legion ritual room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Benri Vallenar is the father of Varic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — Benri Vallenar is a member of the Vallenar family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 20''' — Benri Vallenar is in grave danger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — Benri Vallenar has silver hair that is slashed short and a goatee.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — Benri Vallenar has cold, steel eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — Benri Vallenar has an impressive barrel chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — Benri Vallenar is the real Benri Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — Benri Vallenar is an Archmage with a unique magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — Benri released his magic to the Legion king’s control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 34''' — Benri Vallenar is the son of a man who can wrestle more Aether than any single wizard should be able to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 34''' — Benri Vallenar uses a Mirror of Silence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 34''' — Benri Vallenar is associated with the Vallenar Corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — Mister Vallenar is addressed by the Vallenar Corporation representative.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — Benri Vallenar is in the presence of the Iron King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 43''' — Benri is capable of copying guns and shield generators.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 43''' — Benri can generate colorless copies of himself.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — Benri Vallenar has dark skin and silver eyes and hair.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — Benri Vallenar is the father of the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — Benri Vallenar has silver hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — Benri gestured to Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — Benri Vallenar works late and considers his life an extension of his work.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — Benri is a character who applied to an organization.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Benri Vallenar is a clone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Benri Vallenar is President of the Vallenar Corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Benri is a character who expresses difficulty in extending trust to unknown entities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Mister Vallenar is the name used to address Benri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Benri experienced a bad premonition in his stomach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Benri Vallenar has a connection to Varic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Benri Vallenar has a son.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Benri received a recording of a meeting and conversation with Nila.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 11''' — Benri is the President of the Vallenar Corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Benri Vallenar is a potential mastermind behind the Vallenar ship's movement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Benri is a member of the Vallenar crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — Benri has an optical implant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — Benri's son is the greatest mortal spellcaster in the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — Benri is a President.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Benri is hooking up a data core to a computer for analysis.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Benri tells the Captain that they are negotiating with him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Benri Vallenar deals with possibilities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Benri is a person who uses a console.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 38''' — Benri believed the Voice of Solstice and the lid were communicating.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Benri felt smug about the victory but was unsatisfied because he could not take credit for it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Benri is a clone and an Archmage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Benri is the president of a galactic corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Benri Vallenar is a man who survived a one-on-one conversation with the Iron King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Benri Vallenar is the original version of Benri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Benri has a son.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Benri is a Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Benri's clones can leave a body due to Aethertech enhancements.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Benri has been in long-term stasis.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
